operator_flow: User creates or labels GitHub issue with operator task.
Codex runs local/private work on MacBook when needed.
Codex writes sanitized result summary/evidence hash back to GitHub only when approved.
Live/destructive/broker actions remain blocked unless a separate explicit gate is opened.

local_only: TFEX private formula implementation and constants

purpose: Use GitHub as public/control-plane companion for Codex operator-hands work.
